_meta.description: Low-slope pricing filled (2026-07-10) from Tim's live Low-Slope Roof Price Calculator tab 1. All-in system prices include OH+profit — engine must NOT add OH/profit for all_in_systems. Wood-deck OH adder = $50 (concrete baseline). FBC SAV-M = -$25 vs HVHZ per sheet note. Remaining open items: OI-7, OI-8, OI-9, OI-10 (sloped HVHZ commission, pm_incentive matrix, boundary rules, dumpster boundary).
tim_verify_open_items: OI-7: commission_pct.sloped_hvhz — null; Tim must confirm whether sloped HVHZ jobs use 10% (sloped) or 15% (low_slope) rate (PC-1)
OI-8: pm_incentive — full matrix needs Tim verification before activation (PC matrix per PRD F2-11; current values from plan §10.5)
OI-9: boundary_inclusive_lower / boundary_exclusive_upper — presumed lower-inclusive/upper-exclusive per Exhibit B wording (PC-2); config flag means answer is a data change only
OI-10: tile_dumpster_boundary_inclusive — default true; Tim to confirm (Adv-1 per PRD)
OI-11: low_slope zones — sheet note says FBC deltas unverified except SAV-M -$25 (encoded); confirm all FBC low-slope values match HVHZ or supply deltas

_pending_boundary: Tim — PC-2: confirm lower-inclusive/upper-exclusive sliding-scale boundary rule (OI-9)

commission_pct._pending_sloped_hvhz: Tim — PC-1: confirm sloped HVHZ commission rate (10% same as sloped, or 15% same as low_slope); engine defaults to sloped (0.10) until this is filled (OI-7)

pm_incentive._pending_verify: Tim — full matrix must be verified before activation (OI-8); values from PRD F2-11 plan §10.5

_pending_tile_dumpster_boundary: Tim — Adv-1: confirm whether threshold boundary SQ itself triggers next dumpster (default true = inclusive) (OI-10)

low_slope._note_base_systems: polyglass_sav_sap / tpo_adhered / tpo_mech_attached — engine adds OH+profit on top (separate-OH path). pb_* / stockmeier_* — prices are ALL-IN (include OH+profit); engine must NOT add OH/profit (see all_in_systems).
low_slope._note_fbc_deltas: FBC values set equal to HVHZ per sheet note 'FBC deltas unverified' EXCEPT polyglass_sav_sap which is $25 lower in FBC (sheet explicit). Confirm remaining FBC low-slope values with Tim (OI-11).

HVHZ._note_polyglass_upgrades: SAV+ 3-ply +175 → 650; polyfresko upgrade +80 → 555; polyfresko+SAVplus +315 → 790; encode as adders when quoting (v2)
HVHZ._note_stockmeier_floor: stockmeier min 12 sq; under 12 sq = $390/sq T&M — floor note only, not engine logic v1

FBC._note_fbc_sav_sap: FBC is $25 less than HVHZ per sheet explicit note (SAV M -$25 in FBC)

overhead._note: OH rates apply only to non-all-in systems. flat_oh covers BUR/polyglass; tpo_oh covers TPO systems; coatings_inhouse_oh is informational (coatings are all-in).

low_slope._note_wood_deck_oh: Add $50/sq to overhead when deck_type is a wood variant (concrete is baseline). Jon confirmed 2026-07-10 — sheet showed $45 but Jon corrected to $50.
low_slope._note_insulation_tiers: From sheet: board_1in $255, board_1_5in $275, board_2in $310 per sq (no profit). Tiers are type-based not sq-range-based — all have null max so first match wins; v1 uses first entry (1-in board default). Tapered system is separate (tapered_cost_per_sq). No OH or profit on insulation per Exhibit B.

deck_types._pending_plywood_replace: Tim — generic plywood deck replacement adder per sq (OI-5 — partial; specific deck adders now filled above)

low_slope._note_tear_off: Additional hauling $20/sq, labor $20/sq, OH $35/sq per layer (+$75/sq per extra layer per sheet note). Engine v1 uses $20/layer/sq for base labor; OH and hauling encoded in tear_off_extras for line-item reporting in v2.

roof_height_notes._note_5_plus: 5+ stories requires crane — manual quote only (null = not engine-quoted). 3-5 stories uses trash_chute_flat_add.
